title: The Shutdown
description: An Server side only Mod that adds features for your Personal Minecraft Server to turn it off.
body:
This Mod is Server Side Only!

This Mod requiers Fabric-API on Fabric! 


You only can turn your Server off when you are the last Player on the Server using the Commands:

•/ssd
•/shutdown

Admins can turn the Server off no matter what with:

•/ssdf
•/shutdownf

In the Version 2.0.0 or above there is a feature that turns the Server off Automatically. There are also two new Game Rules:

•ssdtime: lets you choose the time how long no players have to be on the Server so it turns off. 0 to disable, default 15min
•ssdcommand: lets you enable/disable the ssd/shutdown command. The Game Rule doesn't effect the ssdf/shutdownf commands for admins!
